rationale: Educ. Code §29.908 governs the early college education program. It contains no reference to property tax, homestead exemptions, or Tax Code §11.13. The proposed change is unrelated.
quote: The commissioner shall establish and administer an early college education program for students who are at risk of dropping out of school or who wish to accelerate completion of the high school program.
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses early college education and has no nexus to homestead exemption amounts or property tax.
